title: FeltOptimized VulkanEdition
description: FeltOptimized VulkanEDITION is a high-performance FPS boost modpack built to unleash the full power of Vulkan rendering for smoother, faster gameplay on low- to mid-end PCs. Packed with performance-enhancing mods, render optimizations!
body:
🌋 FeltOptimized VulkanEdition
FeltOptimized VulkanEdition is a lightweight, ultra-tuned FPS boost modpack designed to harness the raw performance of Vulkan rendering in Minecraft. Tailored for players using low- to mid-end systems, this pack delivers smooth, responsive gameplay with minimal resource usage.

🚀 Key Features:
🔧 Built-in Vulkan renderer support for drastically improved performance

🎮 Optimized for both PvP and survival gameplay

🧹 Lag-reduction mods, memory optimizers, and GUI tweaks

🌙 Lightweight resource usage – perfect for laptops and budget PCs

⚙️ Zero bloat, maximum performance – just plug, play, and fly

🔧 Perfect For:
- Low-spec systems

- Competitive PvP

- Smooth singleplayer and multiplayer performance

- Players seeking a clean, minimal experience

✅ Tested on ultra-low-end setups
🧠 Built by the team behind HyperBoost & FeltOptimized
📦 Minecraft versions: [Currently 1.21.5.... Soon I Will Release For 1.20.1/1.19.2 and other!]
